hero.heading: Your Backyard Just Got Crowned
hero.subheading: Premium inflatable rentals, water slides, interactive games, and party packages. Bridgewater-based and serving South Shore, Nova Scotia, and select Atlantic Canada events by availability and travel quote.

intro.heading: Premium inflatable fun, professionally handled.
intro.text: Nova Kingdom Rentals brings premium inflatable fun to backyard birthdays, school events, community events, and summer celebrations. We are Bridgewater-based and serve South Shore, Nova Scotia, and select Atlantic Canada events by availability and travel quote.

categories.title: Lawn Games
categories.text: Easy add-ons for birthdays, schools, and community events.

howItWorks.title: Choose your fun
howItWorks.text: Pick a rental or package that fits your event.

howItWorks.title: Send date and address
howItWorks.text: Share the details so availability and travel can be checked.

howItWorks.title: We confirm and deliver
howItWorks.text: Booking is confirmed after availability, setup suitability, travel, and deposit details are reviewed.
